conspicuously.ex: He was conspicuously absent from meeting.

conspiracy.ex: Many people believe the latest conspiracy.

conspiratorial.def: 陰謀的、共謀的人的人物
conspiratorial.ex: They spoke in a low conspiratorial whisper.

conspire.def: 密謀、共同導致的人的人
conspire.ex: Events seemed to conspire against him today.

conspirator.def: 陰謀者、同謀者人物 (單數)
conspirator.ex: The chief conspirator was arrested today.

constable.def: 巡官、警察、(英)警員人物 (單數)
constable.ex: The local constable arrived at the scene.

constabulary.def: 警察隊、警察職務的人物 (單數)
constabulary.ex: The county constabulary was on high alert.

constancy.def: 堅定、恆定、不變性的人物 (單數)
constancy.ex: He vowed eternal constancy to his wife.

constant.def: 不變的、恆定的、常數、恆量的人的人物 (定)
constant.ex: The car traveled at a very constant speed.

constantly.ex: The technology is constantly evolving today.

constellation.ex: Orion is a famous and bright constellation.

consternation.def: 驚愕、驚恐、震驚的人物 (單數)
consternation.ex: The news caused much consternation in town.

constipate.def: 使便秘、使遲鈍的人的人
constipate.ex: Too much dry food can constipate the system.

constipation.ex: He suffered from chronic constipation today.

constituency.ex: He represented a small rural constituency.

constituent.def: 成分、選民、組成的的人的人物 (單數)
constituent.ex: Voters are the constituents of democracy.

constitute.def: 構成、組成、設立的人的人
constitute.ex: The move could constitute a threat to peace.

constitution.def: 憲法、體質、構成物人物 (單數)
constitution.ex: She has a very fragile physical constitution.

constitutional.def: 憲法的、體質的人的人物 (法)
constitutional.ex: He took his daily constitutional in the park.

constitutionally.ex: The leader was constitutionally barred again.

constitutive.def: 構成的、制憲的人的人物
constitutive.ex: Water is a constitutive element of our life.

constrain.def: 強迫、限制、抑制的人的人
constrain.ex: Lack of funds will constrain our major research.

constrained.def: 受限的、不自然的人的人 (或物)
constrained.ex: He spoke in a very small and constrained voice.

constraint.def: 限制、約束、強迫的人物 (單數)
constraint.ex: Budget constraint limited the local project.

constrict.def: 壓縮、收縮、束縛的人的人
constrict.ex: Cold weather will constrict blood vessels.

constriction.def: 收縮、壓縮、束縛的人物 (單數)
constriction.ex: He felt a sudden constriction in his chest.

constrictor.def: 括約肌、大蟒蛇的人物 (單數)
constrictor.ex: The boa constrictor wrapped around prey.

construct.def: 建造、構建、構思、建立的人的人人物 (單數)
construct.ex: Gender is often seen as a social construct.

construction.def: 建造、結構、解釋、建築業的人物 (單數)
construction.col: under construction, construction site, bridge construction
construction.ex: The bridge is currently under construction.

constructive.def: 建設性的、構造的人的人物 (益)
constructive.ex: I welcome your very constructive criticism.

constructively.ex: The two sides talked constructively today.

constructor.def: 建造者、(編)構造函數人物 (單數)

construe.def: 解釋、翻譯、分析的人的人
construe.ex: His silence was construed as agreement.

consul.def: 領事、(羅)執政官人物 (單數)
consul.ex: He was appointed honorary consul today.

consular.def: 領事的人、領事館的人的人物
consular.ex: They applied for help at consular service.

consulate.ex: The american consulate is located on hill.

consult.def: 諮詢、參考、商議的人的人
consult.ex: You should consult a doctor about the pain.

consultancy.def: 顧問公司、諮詢職務的人物 (單數)
consultancy.ex: He works for a management consultancy.

consultant.def: 顧問、諮詢者的人物 (單數)
consultant.ex: She is a senior consultant in the local firm.

consultation.def: 諮詢、諮商、協議的人物 (單數)
consultation.ex: The decision was made in consultation with group.

consumable.ex: Office paper is a vital consumable good.

consume.def: 消耗、消費、吃畢、燒毀的人的人
consume.ex: Building the fence was very time-consuming.

consumer.col: consumer protection, consumer goods, consumer rights
consumer.ex: Consumer protection laws are very strict.

consumerism.def: 消費主義、用戶利益之保護人物 (單數)
consumerism.ex: Consumerism is a major part of modern life.

consummate.def: 圓滿、使完成、極其的人的人人物 (單數)
consummate.ex: He is a consummate artist of our times.

consummation.def: 圓滿、完成、成就的人物 (單數)
consummation.ex: The deal reached its longed consummation.

consumption.def: 消費(量)、燃燒、(醫)肺結核人物 (單數)

contact.def: 接觸、聯繫、接點、與...聯繫的人的人人物 (單數)
contact.col: eye contact, contact details, contact lenses, lose contact
contact.ex: She made eye contact with him and smiled.

contagion.def: 傳染、蔓延、傳染病人物 (單數)
contagion.ex: Fear can spread like a social contagion today.

contagious.ex: Her loud laughter is very contagious tonight.

contain.def: 包含、容納、抑制的人的人
contain.ex: The box managed to contain all my books.

container.ex: Put the leftovers in a glass container now.

contaminate.def: 污染、弄髒、毒害的人的人
contaminate.ex: The oil spill will contaminate the water.

contaminated.def: 被污染的、髒的人的人 (或物)
contaminated.ex: The local soil was contaminated with chemicals.

contamination.ex: Staff were told to avoid contamination today.
